$comment: Issue module → area label → owner mapping. Single source of truth for .github/workflows/issue-triage.yml. The 'module' key must exactly match the dropdown option text in .github/ISSUE_TEMPLATE/bug_report.yml and question.yml. Edit owners here — no workflow change needed.

modules.module: Agent 检测与连接 / Agent Detection & Connection
modules.label: area/agent-detection

modules.module: 项目、文件与预览 / Project, Files & Preview
modules.label: area/workspace

modules.module: WebUI 与远程连接 / WebUI & Remote Access
modules.label: area/webui

modules.module: 界面显示与桌面宠物 / Interface, Display & Desktop Pet
modules.label: area/display
